title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 411.015 - Scope of law
text:
411.015.  Scope of law. — The provisions of the "Missouri Grain Warehouse Law" shall apply to all warehouses located within the state of Missouri.
(L. 1965 p. 606, A.L. 1967 p. 637, A.L. 1971 H.B. 180 § 2, A.L. 1977 S.B. 75, A.L. 1993 H.B. 822)
